notable_rules: Single-font system (Inter) with weight variation for hierarchy.
Midnight navy (#0F1B2D) as primary brand color and heading text color.
Cyan (#00B4D8) as primary accent — links, CTAs, active states, SHIFT text.
Clean white backgrounds with light slate surfaces for card/section contrast.
Border radius: 8px for cards, 6px for buttons, 4px for inputs.
Button primary: cyan bg, white text. Button secondary: navy outline.
No gradients — flat colors only, consistent with logo guidelines.
Dark mode: navy (#0F1B2D) bg, white text, cyan accents preserved.

illustration_style.editorial_direction: Enterprise AI transformation scenes — boardrooms, modern offices, teams collaborating with AI dashboards and workflows. Professional, forward-looking, implementation-focused.
illustration_style.rendering: Photorealistic corporate photography, clean lighting, modern interiors, tech-forward but human-centered.
illustration_style.composition: Balanced layouts with clear focal point, generous negative space, suitable for hero sections and cards.
illustration_style.mood: Confident, progressive, professional, transformative — never defensive or compliance-heavy.
motifs: workflow diagrams and process transformation visuals
avoid: watermarks, text overlays, logos in photos
cartoon or flat vector illustration style

style_notes: Brand positioning: TokenShift helps enterprises move AI from pilots to production — redesigning workflows, upskilling teams, and embedding AI into daily operations with measurable ROI.
Logo: Linked Rings mark (two interlocking tilted ring outlines — navy + cyan) + TOKENSHIFT wordmark.
Wordmark split: TOKEN in navy (#0F1B2D), SHIFT in cyan (#00B4D8).
Never use gradients in the logo or brand mark.
Minimum clear space around logo: height of one ring.
Dark backgrounds: use white rings + white TOKEN, cyan SHIFT.
The rings symbolize integration — technology and people, tools and ways of working.
Tone of voice: Direct, expert, outcome-focused. We implement, we transform, we deliver.
